name: Silver Name
description: Your username glows with a subtle silver shimmer.

name: Gold Name
description: A rich golden username with soft shimmer animation.

name: Rainbow Name
description: Your username cycles through vibrant rainbow colors.

name: Flame Name
description: Your username burns with cycling fire colors.

name: Cyberpunk Glow
description: Cyan neon glow with random micro-flicker effect.

name: Glitch Effect
description: Digital glitch displacement with RGB split on your name.

name: Matrix Code
description: Green terminal-style name, inspired by the Matrix.

name: Sparkle Trail
description: Tiny sparkle particles float around your golden name.

name: Motion Trail
description: Your name leaves a pink trailing shadow effect.

name: Neon Frame
description: A sharp blue neon double-border around your avatar.

name: Pixel Frame
description: Retro 8-bit pixel border around your avatar.

name: Crown Frame
description: A golden crown sits atop your avatar. Royalty.

name: VIP Border
description: Exclusive star-highlighted border for dedicated coders.

name: Custom Title
description: Set a custom title that appears under your name.

name: Pulse Avatar
description: Your avatar gently pulses with a breathing animation.

name: Premium Emojis
description: Unlock exclusive emoji reactions in the chat.
